log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Vedalken — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Vedalken — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Vedalken — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 14] HIT! 11 damage. Vedalken — Winged Striker HP: 56/67
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 18 damage. Vedalken — Winged Striker HP: 38/67
→ Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Vedalken — Winged Striker HP: 21/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Vedalken — Winged Striker --- HP: 21/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:5+4=9 vs DC 16] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:9+4=13 vs DC 16] FAIL. Still paralyzed.

ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
